dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, as if things were not bad enough. While you were helping us {quest_action}, {quest_threat_the} worsened and brought new problems.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the disruption near {quest_focus_the} has left supplies exposed {location_hint}. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} running dangerously low. We need you to secure more {quest_item} before what little we have is gone.
dialogueChunks.outro: Misfortune compounds misfortune. But we have to keep fighting.

dialogueChunks.intro: More misfortune, {player_name}. Your work to {quest_action} was going well until a second wave of {quest_threat_the} undid half your progress.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been hit again. {quest_ally} managed to salvage some {quest_item}, but we lost most of the stockpile. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} in desperate need of those resources. Gather what you can from {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I know this feels like pushing a boulder uphill. But we are close: one more effort.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I hate to ask again. Since you began to {quest_action}, we discovered that {quest_threat_the} caused hidden damage to {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The situation is more fragile than we thought. {quest_ally} found the damage runs deeper than the surface. We need {quest_item} from {location_hint} to stabilize things before {quest_focus_the} fails entirely.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without your help, {quest_stakes_the} will be lost to nothing more than bad luck and bad timing.
